description: ForexGod's Published TradingView Charts - includes all drawings (CHoCH, FVG, imbalances)
instructions: Add your published chart URLs here. Format: https://www.tradingview.com/chart/SYMBOL/xxxxx/

swing_points.white_dots: Swing Highs - peaks of body candles (max of open/close)
swing_points.orange_dots: Swing Lows - bottoms of body candles (min of open/close)
swing_points.note: BODY-ONLY analysis: wicks are ignored, only body (open/close) matters

structure_labels.HH_HL: Bullish structure - Higher Highs and Higher Lows pattern
structure_labels.LH_LL: Bearish structure - Lower Highs and Lower Lows pattern
structure_labels.note: Structure determines trend direction based on body swing points

imbalance_zones.red_zones: Bearish imbalance (FVG bearish) - unfilled gap, potential resistance
imbalance_zones.green_zones: Bullish imbalance (FVG bullish) - unfilled gap, potential support
imbalance_zones.blue_zones: Reverse imbalance - previously tested, role reversed

blue_mechanism.red_to_blue: When price breaks ABOVE red zone → becomes blue (support potential)
blue_mechanism.green_to_blue: When price breaks BELOW green zone → becomes blue (resistance potential)
blue_mechanism.explanation: Blue zones are imbalances that have been tested and now act opposite to their original role

choch_markers.description: Change of Character - marks where market structure shifts
choch_markers.bullish_choch: Price breaks above previous high = bearish→bullish shift
choch_markers.bearish_choch: Price breaks below previous low = bullish→bearish shift

trading_strategy.step_3: Wait for price to retrace into FVG
trading_strategy.step_4: Look for 4H CHoCH confirmation in FVG zone
trading_strategy.step_5: Enter trade with defined risk management
